name: sn-setup
description: Scaffold Claude-powered projects (Agent SDK + Managed Agents) and render tunability-ranked session-usage reports into Obsidian.

plugins.name: setup-project-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold Claude-powered projects (Tier 2 Agent SDK + Tier 3 Managed Agents) following Anthropic conventions and OpenAI harness engineering principles. Also ships /sn-session-report for tunability-ranked Markdown usage reports into the Obsidian vault.
